system.summary: Once / week, open 3m x 3m door that lasts 3 rounds to another plane.

effect.notes: Opens a 3 m by 3 m doorway to another plane.

description.value: The mutant can open a doorway to an alternate plane of existence. The opening is 3 by 3 meters and lasts up to 3 full melee turns, at the mutant's discretion. The destination plane may or may not be inhabited. Once something enters, it cannot leave again unless the mutant opens another doorway, which makes this a useful power for exile. Only one such door may be opened each week.
